headline: Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) Stock Sees Fair Value Cut As Analysts Trim Growth Views
summary: For Intuitive Surgical, fair value estimates have been reset from US$565.25 to US$501.73, pointing to a more measured view of potential upside versus earlier assumptions. Recent analyst commentary frames this shift as an expectations reset, with most firms keeping positive or neutral ratings while trimming price targets to account for slower procedure growth, Affordable Care Act related volume uncertainty, and tighter MedTech valuation multiples. Read on to see how to track these evolving...

headline: ISRG Growth Story Hinges on Da Vinci 5, Ion and Recurring Revenue
summary: Intuitive Surgical's growth rests on da Vinci 5, Ion, SP and digital tools as recurring revenue rises and procedure risks persist.

headline: ISRG Trends Point to AI, Lung Biopsy Growth and Margin Pressure
summary: ISRG's growth is fueled by robotic surgery, Ion lung biopsy and AI tools, while tariffs, product mix and softer demand pressure margins.

headline: Is ISRG Stock Worth Buying as Growth Stays Strong but Risks Rise
summary: ISRG's strong procedure growth, recurring revenue and cash position support its case, but tariffs, mix shifts and placement risks cloud the outlook.

headline: Can ISRG Maintain Its Premium Valuation Amid Slower Procedure Growth?
summary: Intuitive Surgical's valuation has eased as U.S. procedure growth slows, but margin gains, AI software expansion and global growth could support its premium.

raw.headline: Can ISRG Maintain Its Premium Valuation Amid Slower Procedure Growth?

headline: J&J enters US robotic surgery market after device gets marketing authorization
summary: Johnson & Johnson said on Wednesday the U.S. Food and Drug Administration had granted marketing authorization for its robotic surgery ‌device, as the healthcare conglomerate enters the soft-tissue robotic surgery market.  The decision ‌marks a key step for J&J's medtech business that had been seeking to compete in the robotic-assisted ​surgery market, currently dominated by Intuitive Surgical's da Vinci system.  Medtronic's Hugo robot was also approved last year.

headline: The Nightview Fund Q2 2026 Portfolio Review
summary: Salesforce is our clearest expression of the system-of-record thesis. It holds the customer relationships of a large slice of the corporate world.
